reports.title: 2025 Season Roundup

reports.title: Otillo World Series Cannes 2022
reports.excerpt: Jellyfish, islands, nudist beaches and the South of France. Plus a 1,300m swim back to the mainland.

reports.title: Otillo Malta 2021
reports.excerpt: Racing the warm, crystal-clear waters of Malta after a successful season at Breca Gower and the National Champs.

reports.title: Breca Coniston Swimrun Sprint 2021
reports.excerpt: After 15 months of postponed race dates, finally — race day in the Lake District. The atmosphere was electric.

reports.excerpt: Racing in the Swiss Alps in Covid-compliant format — masks at registration, video briefings, and stunning mountain lakes.

reports.title: As Keen As Mustard — Long Eaton 2020
reports.excerpt: I am not a runner. Having just completed my first swimrun event, here's the journey that got me there.

reports.title: Breca Gower Swimrun 2019
reports.excerpt: A 42km endurance race on the Gower Peninsula in Wales. The race that started it all for many SÖS members.

reports.title: Otillo Final 15km, Uto, Sweden 2019
reports.excerpt: Racing the Otillo Final on the island of Uto — in the Stockholm archipelago, birthplace of swimrun itself.

reports.title: Breca Gower Swimrun 2018
reports.excerpt: An unforgettable day on the Gower coast — the one that convinced Sarah to keep going back, year after year.

reports.title: Oloppet Swimrun, Gothenburg 2018
reports.excerpt: Racing in Sweden felt like coming home for a sport that was born here, on these very kinds of lakes and forest trails.
